audit_items.proof_trace: HEAPMODE=(COMPRESSIONLEVEL>STACKLIMIT)=(12>13)=0, so the only malloc-based NPD path (srt->hashTable after double malloc failure) is compiled out entirely. All active callers in block_wrappers.cc allocate source/dest buffers via C++ `new` (which throws std::bad_alloc, never returns NULL), ensuring both pointers are always valid. The ref pointer computed from attacker-controlled data is guarded by `if (ref < (BYTE* const)dest) goto _output_error` before any dereference.
